commands.review_summary:
The PR adds best-effort `thread/unsubscribe` cleanup for Codex app-server threads after completed non-timeout runs and turn-start failures, plus focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection and the linked issue's process evidence show current main lacks main-run thread unsubscribe cleanup while the app-server dependency supports that cleanup contract.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof or maintainer override before merge; there is no narrow automated code repair to request from ClawSweeper.

target.title: fix(codex): unsubscribe app-server thread after runs
target.body:
Summary
- release the main Codex app-server thread subscription after completed non-timeout turns
- release the subscription when `turn/start` fails after a thread has already been created
- add focused regression coverage for completed-turn and turn-start-failure cleanup

Verification
- `pnpm test extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt-thread-cleanup.test.ts`
- `pnpm test extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts -- -t "restarts the app-server once|tolerates a second app-server close" --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check -- extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt-thread-cleanup.test.ts`

Real behavior proof
- Ran an isolated local Gateway with Chrome DevTools MCP configured against a headless Chrome fixture.
- Completed two Codex turns against the same session:
  - `a56c9a0f-e22e-4201-af6b-007eff90b249`
  - `08e8d325-12b7-4f90-9a03-c3be01ba6f14`
- The repeated-turn snapshot stayed at one Gateway-owned Codex app-server pair and did not accumulate `chrome-devtools-mcp` / `npx` sidecars.
- After stopping the isolated Gateway and Chrome fixture, no proof processes remained.

Scope note
- This releases the app-server thread subscription; it does not force-kill the app-server immediately. Codex still owns the idle unload/reap timing after the subscription is released.

Fixes #84413
target.author: ai-hpc
